title: Tridents Enhanced [Enchantments]
description: This plugin and datapack combo adds new enchantments for tridents!
body:
# **REQUIRES BOTH DATAPACK AND PLUGIN TO BE INSTALLED SERVERSIDE**

**Currently adds three enchantments: 
All enchantments can be found only in the enchantment table. Chaos flame III is incredibly rare, and from my experience it is easiest to combine 2 Chaos flame II tridents.**

### Shadowblast:


Shadowblast explodes on impact, producing dark particle effects. Can be found in enchanting table pool. Incompatible with channeling and riptide

### 
### Destined Death:


Destined death produces a red cloud of lingering wither effect and makes a sound effect. 


### Chaos Flame:

Chaos flame produces a riptide-like effect, dashing you forward whilst leaving a trail of blaze fireballs behind you setting everything ablaze. Increasing in tier up to Chaos Flame III, each tier adds more fire and more dash velocity, but Chaos Flame III also explodes on impact with an entity. There is a three second cooldown after each dash.

Can only be used during day in the overworld, or in the nether. The high heat from the sun and hell helps you ignite your trident.
